## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of Smith.ai's Webflow CMS for GrowthX team to manage blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team granted editor access to Smith.ai's Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Detailed walkthrough of blog post creation, editing, and publishing process in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Critical warning: Never use the blue "Publish" button; always use the green button for individual page publishing](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [GrowthX team responsible for content creation, image insertion, and eventual publishing after initial review](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)

## Topics

### Webflow CMS Access and Navigation

  - [Access editor mode: Add "?edit" to Smith.ai URL](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Collections contain all editable content (blog posts, categories, tags)](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Preview changes using arrow button; custom code elements don't show in preview](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Use incognito window to view live site while editing to avoid sync errors](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

### Blog Post Creation and Editing

  - [Fields include title, slug, SEO metadata, post summary, body content](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Use proper formatting in Google Docs/Word for easy pasting into Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Add custom elements (photos, videos) via the "+" button](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Set featured status, categories, tags, author (currently Maddy), and publication dates](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [SEO last update field purpose to be clarified](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

### Image Handling

  - [GrowthX responsible for adding and positioning images in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Use TinyPNG for image optimization; convert to WebP format](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Set blog images to full width using the second option in image settings](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

### Publishing Process

  - [Use "Save Draft" for internal review](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - ["Publish Now" or "Schedule" for immediate or future publishing](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Always use the green "Publish" button for individual pages, never the blue site-wide button](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)

### CTA and Email Handling

  - [Automatic CTA appears on all blog posts; chat-specific CTAs available](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [For manual email CTAs, use the "email" link type in Webflow editor](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

## Next Steps

  - Jessica to add <team@crossxlab.com> to Webflow with editor access
  - [GrowthX to draft initial blog posts and notify Jessica/Maddy for review](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Maddy to add Jessica to communication channel for blog post reviews](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin publishing after receiving feedback on initial posts](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Follow up on the purpose of the SEO last update field in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/xj88uJzp1Hpx4UWFyJkD5hxNYtN-bmAA?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
